statements.sql: select `candidates`.*, (select count(*) from `companies` inner join `bookmark_company` on `companies`.`id` = `bookmark_company`.`company_id` where `candidates`.`id` = `bookmark_company`.`candidate_id`) as `bookmark_candidates_count` from `candidates` where `candidates`.`user_id` in (41)

select `candidate_languages`.`id`, `candidate_languages`.`name`, `candidate_language`.`candidate_id` as `pivot_candidate_id`, `candidate_language`.`candidate_language_id` as `pivot_candidate_language_id` from `candidate_languages` inner join `candidate_language` on `candidate_languages`.`id` = `candidate_language`.`candidate_language_id` where `candidate_language`.`candidate_id` in (27)

select `skills`.*, `candidate_skill`.`candidate_id` as `pivot_candidate_id`, `candidate_skill`.`skill_id` as `pivot_skill_id` from `skills` inner join `candidate_skill` on `skills`.`id` = `candidate_skill`.`skill_id` where `candidate_skill`.`candidate_id` in (27)
select `name` from `candidate_languages` inner join `candidate_language` on `candidate_languages`.`id` = `candidate_language`.`candidate_language_id` where `candidate_language`.`candidate_id` = 27
